member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken
member.summary: Context Dut/Ip Ids.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.DutId
member.summary: Gets the Dut id of the current context.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.IpId
member.summary: Gets the Ip id of te current context.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.CurrentInstanceName
member.summary: Gets the current instance name for this token.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.Create(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create a new SessionToken.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.ToString
member.summary: Format this object to string. for Debug print.
member.returns: A string that represent the current object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService
member.summary: Shared Storage for internal usage.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService.LotStart(System.String)
member.summary: Clears all tables with LOT context.
member.param: Instance name that runs this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService.DeviceStart(System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Clears all tables with DUT and IP context.
member.param: Instance name that runs this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService.GetUnsafeRowFromTable``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.param: the key in the table to store the data.
the context of the data to store.
member.returns: A copy of the stored object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService.GetUnsafeRowFromTable``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.param: the key in the table to store the data.
the context of the data to store.
The reset policy for ths row.
member.returns: A copy of the stored object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.ISharedStorageService.SetSingleAppDomainMode
member.summary: Call only this at the end of the load sequence when kernel identified we're running is a single ApDomain mode.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRow`1
member.summary: Interface for unsafe row wrapper.
member.typeparam: The type of object stored in this row.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRow`1.Lock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Lock this row for operations. Get a handle to the internal storage object.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A ref handle to the stored object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRow`1.LockAndInvokeOnAllDuts(System.Func{`0},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Run action on all Duts for this unsafeRow. This operation can be done only on UnsafeRow created for Context.IP type.
member.param: A func that returns T to assign to dut storage rows held in this object.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRow`1.LockAndInvokeOnAllIps(System.Func{`0},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Run action on all Ips for this unsafeRow. This operation can be done only on UnsafeRow created for Context.IP type.
member.param: A func that returns T to assign to IP storage rows held in this object.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRowObject`1
member.summary: Interface for an unsafe reference to stored object.
member.typeparam: The type of object stored in this row.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRowObject`1.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the stored object. Value might be null if key was not set before.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRowObject`1.GetVersionNumber
member.summary: Get the current row version number.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Internal.IUnsafeRowObject`1.CommitChanges
member.summary: After changes were made flag that they need to be committed into the SharedStorage.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Context
member.summary: The context of the shared storage.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.Context.LOT
member.summary: Data is shared across DUTs and IPs

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.Context.DUT
member.summary: Data is shared across all IPs belonging to current DUT Data is not shared across different parallel DUTs in mDUT.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.Context.IP
member.summary: Data is shared only within the current IP Data is not shared with other IPs or other parallel DUTs in mDUT

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy
member.summary: The reset policy for the stored data.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy.RESET_AT_LOT_START
member.summary: Data resets at lot start.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy.RESET_AT_DEVICE_START
member.summary: Data resets at start of device.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy.NEVER_RESET
member.summary: Data remains until test program is unloaded.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService
member.summary: The shared storage service - a single place to store shared data for the whole library. Data is shared across test instances or methodologies by inserting data rows into a table. Users can access and store information into this table using keys that are mapped to a singular row, similar to dictionaries.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.InsertRowAtTable(System.String,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: The key used to store the row into the table.
String value to store in the row.
Defines the scope to retrieve this data from.
Determines when the row should be removed from the table.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.InsertRowAtTable``1(System.String,``0,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.typeparam: The type of data contained at the row pointed to by the key.
member.param: The key used to store the row into the table.
Data to store in the row.
Defines the scope to retrieve this data from.
Determines when the row should be removed from the table.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.GetRowFromTable``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.typeparam: The type of data contained at the row pointed to by the key.
member.param: The key used to store the row into the table.
Defines the scope to retrieve this data from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The copy of the object stored using the provided key.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.TryGetValue``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.typeparam: The type of data contained at the row pointed to by the key.
member.param: The key used to store the row into the table.
Defines the scope to retrieve this data from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: A tuple of (bool, obj). If the bool returns true, the object was found and returned. Otherwise, the object is null.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.GetTableKeys``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns a list of all keys that store rows that contain data of type T.
member.remarks: This API consumes a lot of test time, and should be used mainly for debugging purposes. The more objects stored, the longer this API will take to execute.
member.typeparam: The type of object to query. All returning keys will contain data of this type.
member.param: Defines the scope to retrieve this data from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: List of string keys that contain the data of type T.
member.exception: Thrown when Global fail to get.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.GetAllTablesDataAsString
member.summary: Get all SharedStorage object data as string.
member.returns: String that represents the content of all tables.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.MakeRowSecured``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Flag object row as secured, will not be exposed in any method.
member.typeparam: The type of data contained at the row pointed to by the key.
member.param: The key used to store the row into the table.
the context of the data to store.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.TruncTable``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Remove all keys that store rows of type T within the provided context.
member.typeparam: The type of data to remove from SharedStorage.
member.param: The context to scope the removal of data from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService.DeleteRowFromTable``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Delete the row that is pointed to by the key that stores an object of type T.
member.typeparam: The type of data contained at the row pointed to by the key.
member.param: The key of the row to delete from the table.
The context to scope the removal of data from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.ArrayReferencePreservingConverter
member.summary: Convertor.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.ArrayReferencePreservingConverter.CanWrite
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether can write.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.ArrayReferencePreservingConverter.CanConvert(System.Type)
member.summary: CanConvert.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.ArrayReferencePreservingConverter.ReadJson(Newtonsoft.Json.JsonReader,System.Type,System.Object,Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializer)
member.summary: Read.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.ArrayReferencePreservingConverter.WriteJson(Newtonsoft.Json.JsonWriter,System.Object,Newtonsoft.Json.JsonSerializer)
member.summary: Write.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase
member.summary: The Central DB object. Will instantiate only once at the "Prime" AppDomain and all Local DBs will reference to it.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.GetOrAddNewDataRow(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: Get new row or create new empty one if not exists.
member.param: reset policy to apply if new row is created.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.GetAllTablesDataAsString(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Get all the tables as string to print to the console by the TM.
member.returns: all the tables' data as string.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.LotStart(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: The LotStart operation to clear al row with RestPolicy = RESET_AT_LOT_START.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.DeviceStart(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: The DeviceStart operation to clear al row with RestPolicy = RESET_AT_DEVICE_START.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.GetKeys(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: Get all keys of a table.
member.param: name of the table. in cdb all data is aggregated into single table wehre the key constructed as 'table@key'.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabaseContainerForCentralAppDomain
member.summary: A container for the central DB. The code creates temporary instances of this container in order to access the Central DB singleton on central AppDomain (Prime AppDomain).

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabaseContainerForCentralAppDomain.GetCentralDataBase
member.summary: Gets the central DB singleton of the Prime AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabaseContainerForCentralAppDomain.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow
member.summary: The cemtral Data row object. Central DB will be populated only from these type of objects. A central data row is fully controlled by its parent LocalDataRow. including all locks mechanisms. PLEASE DO NOT LOCK THE CDB ROW HERE DIRECTLY.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the row's key for printing purposes.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.LockTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets the lock timeout in ms for.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.ResetPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets The row's Reset Policy.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.Lock(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Wait for other threads to complete the work on this row and Lock the access to the row by other threads.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.ReleaseLock
member.summary: Release the lock from current thread.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.Insert(System.String)
member.summary: Insert new serialized object into the central DB.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.MakeSecured
member.summary: Make this row secured. Meaning it won't be shown on the console and won't seen by GetKeys call.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.Clear(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Clear this row.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow.Get
member.summary: Get the inner serialized object as string.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1
member.summary: THe base class for both local and central rows.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.VersionNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets The current row version number.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.HasValue
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the row has value.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.IsSecured
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the row is secured.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.StoredObject
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual stored object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.Clear(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Clear the current row content.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase`1.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1
member.summary: A Table of specific type. Contains all the data rows for this type.
member.typeparam: the type of the object this table holds.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the default reset policy for this table.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.DefaultResetPolicy
member.summary: Gets the default reset policy for this table. Will be set to all rows in this table unless if the user overrided it.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.GetOrAddNewEmptyDataRow(System.String,System.Func{Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataRowBase{`0}})
member.summary: Get row from the table or add new empty one if not exist.
member.param: function to tell how to build this new row (different between local and central rows.)

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.GetKeys(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get all the non secured keys which has value.
member.param: true to return all keys including the secured ones for LotStart and DeviceStart usage..

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.TruncTable(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Trunc the whole table.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.DataTable`1.GetRows
member.summary: Get all rows.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase
member.summary: The local data base - will be instantiated once per appdomain.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDatabase)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetOrAddNewEmptyDataRow``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Gets an existing DataRow or creates a new one with null data. Used for Local Cache new rows.
member.param: the key in the table to store the data.
the context of the data to store.
The session token for this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetOrAddNewEmptyDataRow``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: Gets an existing DataRow or creates a new one with null data. Used for Local Cache new rows.
member.param: the key in the table to store the data.
the context of the data to store.
The session token for this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetKeys``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: Get all keys for the specific table type.
member.param: The session token for this operation.
the context of the data to store.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetOrAddNewEmptyLotDataRow``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: helper function to get unsafe rows.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetOrAddNewEmptyDutDataRows``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: helper function to get unsafe rows.
member.returns: reference to the internal row for all the DUTs.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetOrAddNewEmptyIpDataRows``1(System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: helper function to get unsafe rows.
member.returns: reference to the internal row for all the DUT/IPs.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.Insert``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.String,``0,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: Insert new value to the storage.
member.param: The session token for this operation.
the reset policy for the row if not exist.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.GetRowFromTable``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: Get a row from table.
member.param: The session token for this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.TruncTable``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: Trunc the whole table.
member.param: The session token for this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.DeleteRowFromTable``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: Delete a specific row from table.
member.param: The session token for this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase.Secure``1(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context)
member.summary: make a key secured.
member.param: The session token for this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1
member.summary: THe local data row class.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.CentralDataRow,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: reference to the matching row in the central DB.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.ReleaseLockForUnsafeRow
member.summary: When using unsafe row, this will be called to release the row's lock.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.LockForUnsafeRow(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: When using unsafe row, this will be called to lock the row's lock.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.GetUnsafeStoredObject(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get the internal stored object - it is end user responsibility to wrap with a proper locks.
member.param: whether to update from central first or skip it.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.InsertUnsafeValue(`0)
member.summary: Insert new value to the row. Note that this will update only the local DB. THe central DB will be updated when UpdateToCentralDataBaseAsync will be called.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Insert(`0,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Insert new value to the row.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Insert(`0,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Insert new value to the row.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.GetLocalValueCopy(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Get copy of the stored value. In a safe environment we always return copy of the DB instead of reference to the DB itself.
member.returns: A copy of the stored object.
member.exception: if the row has no value.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Clear(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Clear the current row's data.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Secure(Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Make this row secured.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.UnsafeUpdateToCentralDataBase
member.summary: Update to CDB at then Dispose of the unsafe row. This will be done without putting anything into the Enqueue function in order not to create a deadlock between the semaphore lock and the row lock.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.WaitAllPendingUpdatesToCentralAsync
member.summary: wait for the update to CDB task to complete.
member.returns: async task that waits for the completion.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.UpdateToCentralDataBaseAsync(`0,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken,System.Nullable{Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy})
member.summary: Update the current local stored object to the central DB.
member.param: new reset policy or null if reset policy should be updated.
member.returns: the running task that updated the central DB.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Enqueue(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: This function takes care of executing the tasks on different tasks but in a sequential order. This is in order to control the order of calls like: Insert -> Get where the Get is expected to be executed only after the Insert.
member.param: the task to do the actual work. NOTE THAT THE THE TASK MUST FIRST RELEASE THE this.taskQueueSemaphore after started to let the next thread to start the work.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow`1.Enqueue``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: This function takes care of executing the tasks on different tasks but in a sequential order. This is in order to control the order of calls like: Insert -> Get where the Get is expected to be executed only after the Insert.
member.param: the task to do the actual work. NOTE THAT THE THE TASK MUST FIRST RELEASE THE this.taskQueueSemaphore after started to let the next thread to start the work.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject
member.summary: The actual stored object of the central DB. It has the capability to serialize/desrialize objects to string.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject.IsSingleAppDomain
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether we're currently running in SingleAppDomain mode. This SingleAppDomain is the "Fast and Dirty" solution to stop object serialization to the CDB when running on a Single AppDomain. TODO: Work on a better design for this feature not involving this 'if (IsSingleAppDomain)'.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize object to json.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Serialize object from json.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.SerializedObject.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.Tables`1
member.summary: The container of tables for certain type. Holds the tables for Lot/Dut/Ip.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.Tables`1.DutTables
member.summary: Gets or sets the DUT tables for this type.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.Tables`1.IpTables
member.summary: Gets or sets the IP tables for this type.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.Tables`1.LotTables
member.summary: Gets or sets the LOT tables for this type.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.Tables`1.GetTable(Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.AccessToken)
member.summary: Get table by context.
member.param: the context of the table to get.
The session token for this operation.
member.returns: the matching table for the criteria.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.UnsafeRow`1
member.summary: A wrapper to a row when accessing it unsafely. Unsafe means it is the end user responsibility handle multi-threads but it will save extra copy of the data.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.UnsafeRow`1.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDatabase,System.String,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the reset policy for the unsafe row.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.UnsafeRowObject`1
member.summary: The unsafe wrapper when accessing the local row directly.
member.typeparam: the type of the stored object.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.UnsafeRowObject`1.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.LocalDataRow{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the reference to the row in the storage.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.DataStructures.UnsafeRowObject`1.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes an instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainGetter
member.summary: Class for AppDomainGetter operations.

member.summary: AppDomain the Central Database resides in.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper
member.summary: Provides utility methods related to the type. All members of this type are threadsafe.

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper.Host
member.summary: The CorRuntimeHost, as an .

member.name: F:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper.LazyDefaultAppDomain
member.summary: The default AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper.DefaultAppDomain
member.summary: Gets the default AppDomain. This property caches the resulting value.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper.GetAppDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an AppDomain by the Friendly name.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.Shared.AppDomainHelper.EnumAppDomains
member.summary: Returns the list of loaded AppDomains.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.IAppDomainGetter
member.summary: AppDomain Getter interface.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.IAppDomainGetter.CentralDatabaseAppDomain
member.summary: Gets the Central Database AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.IAppDomainGetter.IsCurrentAppDomainCentralDatabaseAppDomain
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current AppDomain is the Central Database AppDomain or not.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.IAppDomainGetter.CreateInstanceAndUnwrap(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns an instance from the CentralDatabaseAppDomain.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.SharedStorageService
member.summary: Shared Storage class for C# implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.SharedStorageService.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.IAppDomainGetter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for UnitTests purposes.
member.param: a mocked AppDomainGetter from the UTs.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.SharedStorageService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.SharedStorageService.SharedStorageService.AppDomainGetter
member.summary: Gets or sets the AppDomainGetter instance.

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.SharedStorageService.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: every class that derives from MarshalByRefObject and should have infinite lifetime has to override InitializeLifetimeService() and return null, so .Net has no object to init it's LifetimeService.
member.returns: No timeout condition for proxy object.

member.name: T:Prime.SharedStorageService.TelemetryPerformanceScopes
member.summary: Logger performance scopes as Shared Storage can't be dependent on TelemetryService (circular dependency).

member.name: M:Prime.SharedStorageService.TelemetryPerformanceScopes.GetApiPerformanceScope(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Get performance scope.
member.param: Additional data as Func of dictionary.

member.name: T:DeepCopyExtensions.DeepCopyByExpressionTrees
member.summary: Superfast deep copier class, which uses Expression trees.

member.name: M:DeepCopyExtensions.DeepCopyByExpressionTrees.DeepCopyByExpressionTree``1(``0,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Object,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of an object.
member.param: Dictionary of already copied objects (Keys: original objects, Values: their copies).

member.summary: Reference Equal Comperator

member.summary: GetHashCode
